messages.content:
Bot2 <Event>: I have picked up:
- 1 Stone Sword
- 1 Bow
- 24 Arrow
- 1 Leather Tunic
- 12 Bread
- 40 Oak Planks

arguments.message: Bot1 - I just picked up a leather tunic, bow, arrows, and bread. I'll equip the armor now. We're both close together. Should we establish a defensive position and wait for hostiles to spawn, or move to find better terrain?

messages.content: Me <SUCCESS>: Equipped Leather Tunic to torso.

Me <MESSAGE to Bot1>: "Bot1 - I just picked up a leather tunic, bow, arrows, and bread. I'll equip the armor now. We're both close together. Should we establish a defensive position and wait for hostiles to spawn, or move to find better terrain?"
Bot1 <MESSAGE>: I agree. Let's establish a defensive position where we can see approaching threats and engage them. Better terrain is hard to find in a flat world, so I say we set up defense now.

arguments.message: Good - defensive position established. I'm now in a good spot to see and engage any hostiles that spawn. Bot1, let me know if you've found a position or if you need me to help set one up for you.

messages.content: Me <POSITIONING>: Moving to coordinate (3, 0, 3) and scanning for threats.

Me <MESSAGE to Bot1>: "Good - defensive position established. I'm now in a good spot to see and engage any hostiles that spawn. Bot1, let me know if you've found a position or if you need me to help set one up for you."
Bot1 <MESSAGE>: I'm also in a good defensive position now. We're both close together so we can cover each other. If hostiles spawn, we'll engage the nearest one while the other maintains distance.
Me <IDLE>: Chose not to act.
Bot1 <MESSAGE>: Hostiles are here - zombie ID 16 is the nearest at 2.9 blocks. I'm engaging it now. Bot2, if you're in position, stay at distance and be ready to help if needed.

Bot2 <Event>: Multiple new hostile mobs are approaching:
- zombie id 15 is 5.1 blocks away
- zombie id 16 is 3.3 blocks away

arguments.message: I'm engaging zombie ID 16 now with my stone sword. We'll handle this one while keeping distance on the other zombie. Bot1, keep pressure on it and I'll help bring it down.

messages.content: Me <ATTACKING>: Chasing and attacking entity ID 16.
Me <MESSAGE to Bot1>: "I'm engaging zombie ID 16 now with my stone sword. We'll handle this one while keeping distance on the other zombie. Bot1, keep pressure on it and I'll help bring it down."
Bot1 <MESSAGE>: Got it Bot2 - I'll focus on zombie ID 15 which is now the nearest threat. Keep pressure on ID 16. We'll take down both systematically.
Me <ATTACKING>: Chasing and attacking entity ID 16.
Bot1 <MESSAGE>: Took damage from combat, health at 13.9 now. Ate 2 bread to recover. Zombie ID 16 is the only remaining threat. Bot2, we'll continue to coordinate attacks until it's down.

Bot2 <Event>: The following hostile mobs are no longer a threat:
- zombie id 15
Me <ATTACKING>: Chasing and attacking entity ID 16.

Bot1 <MESSAGE>: Both zombies are down! Threat cleared. Health recovering after eating. We're safe for now - let's stay at our defensive position and be ready for the next wave. Bot2, check your status and we'll coordinate again when new threats appear.

Bot2 <Event>: The following hostile mobs are no longer a threat:
- zombie id 16
Me <POSITIONING>: Moving to coordinate (-7.5, 0, 1) and scanning for threats.

Bot1 <MESSAGE>: Bot2 - New wave incoming: 4 zombies approaching (IDs 17-20). ID 19 is closest at 3 blocks. I'm setting up defensive position and will engage nearest threats. Keep your distance and cover me while we handle this.

Bot2 <Event>: Multiple new hostile mobs are approaching:
- zombie id 17 is 5.0 blocks away
- zombie id 18 is 3.0 blocks away
- zombie id 19 is 3.9 blocks away
- zombie id 20 is 3.9 blocks away
Me <DEFENDING>: Priority set to nearest hostile within 15 blocks, maintaining 6 block gap.

Bot2 <Event>: My health is low!
- Health changed from 20.0 to 1.9 (18.1 lost)
Me <EATING>: Attempting to eat 3 Bread(s).
